'''Fillorean''' was a [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] circa [[15,500 BBY]].

==Biography==
During Fillorean's [[Time/Legends|time]] as Supreme Chancellor, the Republic first made contact with the [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuins]], resulting in the [[Duinuogwuin Contention]] being fought on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Fillorean ignored demands to mobilize the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] and instead made an attempt to communicate with the Duinuogwuin. The Duinuogqwuin revealed themselves to be intelligent and inherently peaceful, and the philosopher [[Borz'Mat'oh]] agreed to negotiate a treaty with Fillorean.<ref name="TOR Codex">{{TORcite|type=codex|Galactic History 17: The Duinuogwuin Contention}}</ref> After peace had been achieved, Fillorean and Borz'Mat'oh founded the [[University of Coruscant/Legends|University of Coruscant]].<ref name="CatCW" />

The ''[[Chancellor Fillorean]]'', a luxury liner, existed millennia after Fillorean's time as chancellor.<ref name="KOTOR 38">[[Knights of the Old Republic 38|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 38]]</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Fillorean was often criticized by members of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] for being hesitant and indecisive.<ref name="TOR Codex" />
